title: Pokémon Stadium Super Smash Bros Melee Mario Paint Composer
description:
This was so fast and long that I had to use 3 clips, and since I have no experience in video editing, there is a small gap between each clip that I apologize for. Please Enjoy!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
